query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interested_artists WHERE artistUserId IS NOT NULL) as ia_linked,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interested_artists) as ia_total,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings WHERE artistUserId IS NOT NULL) as bk_linked,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings) as bk_total;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user FGYqDqdUZjFkzga.root --database AyEgFhxRkEopXHz25XyihS --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interested_artists WHERE artistUserId IS NOT NULL) as ia_linked,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interested_artists) as ia_total,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings WHERE artistUserId IS NOT NULL) as bk_linked,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings) as bk_total;
